sql_array: CREATE TABLE h3_indexes (index_str String, h3_index UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY index_str;
INSERT INTO h3_indexes (index_str, h3_index) VALUES ('89184926cc3ffff', stringToH3('89184926cc3ffff'));
UPDATE h3_indexes SET h3_index = stringToH3('89184926cc3ffff') WHERE index_str = '89184926cc3ffff';
SELECT index_str, h3_index FROM h3_indexes WHERE h3_index != 0;
SELECT stringToH3('89184926cc3ffff') AS index, stringToH3('invalid_hex_string') AS invalid_index;
